topics.notes_en: Use the equations v = u + at, s = ut + 1/2 at^2, v^2 = u^2 + 2as.
topics.notes_rw: Koresha formula v = u + at, s = ut + 1/2 at^2, v^2 = u^2 + 2as.
topics.misconceptions_en: Mixing units or using the wrong equation for the unknown.
topics.misconceptions_rw: Kuvanga units cyangwa gukoresha formula itariyo.

questions.prompt_en: If u=0 m/s, a=2 m/s^2, t=5 s, find v.
questions.prompt_rw: Niba u=0 m/s, a=2 m/s^2, t=5 s, v ni iki?

questions.prompt_en: If u=3 m/s, a=2 m/s^2, t=4 s, find s.
questions.prompt_rw: Niba u=3 m/s, a=2 m/s^2, t=4 s, s ni iki?

questions.prompt_en: If u=5 m/s, a=1 m/s^2, s=12 m, find v.
questions.prompt_rw: Niba u=5 m/s, a=1 m/s^2, s=12 m, v ni iki?

questions.prompt_en: Slope of a displacement-time graph is:
questions.prompt_rw: Slope y'igishushanyo cya displacement-time ni:
questions.explanation_en: Slope = change in displacement / time = velocity.
questions.explanation_rw: Slope = impinduka ya displacement / time = velocity.

questions.prompt_en: Area under a velocity-time graph gives:
questions.prompt_rw: Area munsi y'igishushanyo cya velocity-time igaragaza:
questions.explanation_en: Area under v-t graph gives displacement.
questions.explanation_rw: Area munsi ya v-t graph ni displacement.

questions.prompt_en: If acceleration is negative, velocity-time graph slope is:
questions.prompt_rw: Niba acceleration ari negative, slope ya velocity-time graph iba:
questions.explanation_en: Slope equals acceleration, so it is negative.
questions.explanation_rw: Slope ingana na acceleration, bityo iba negative.

questions.prompt_en: Convert 72 km/h to m/s.
questions.prompt_rw: Hindura 72 km/h ugire m/s.

questions.prompt_en: If acceleration is zero, motion is:
questions.prompt_rw: Niba acceleration ari zero, umuvuduko uba:
questions.explanation_en: No acceleration means velocity is constant.
questions.explanation_rw: Nta acceleration bivuze ko velocity ihoraho.

questions.prompt_en: Average velocity equals:
questions.prompt_rw: Average velocity ingana na:
questions.explanation_en: Average velocity uses displacement, not distance.
questions.explanation_rw: Average velocity ikoresha displacement, si distance.

questions.prompt_en: An object is thrown up with u=10 m/s, a=-10 m/s^2. Time to stop?
questions.prompt_rw: Ikintu kijugunywe hejuru u=10 m/s, a=-10 m/s^2. Igihe cyo guhagarara?
questions.explanation_en: Use v = u + at, set v=0: 0=10-10t => t=1 s.
questions.explanation_rw: Koresha v = u + at, v=0: 0=10-10t => t=1 s.

topics.notes_en: Ohm's law: V=IR. Series: R_total = R1 + R2. Parallel: 1/Rt = 1/R1 + 1/R2.
topics.notes_rw: Ohm's law: V=IR. Series: R_total = R1 + R2. Parallel: 1/Rt = 1/R1 + 1/R2.
topics.misconceptions_en: Mixing series vs parallel rules or using wrong units.
topics.misconceptions_rw: Kuvanga amategeko ya series na parallel cyangwa units nabi.

questions.prompt_en: If V=12 V and R=4 ohm, find I.
questions.prompt_rw: Niba V=12 V na R=4 ohm, I ni iki?

questions.prompt_en: Two resistors 2 ohm and 3 ohm in series. Total resistance?
questions.prompt_rw: Resistors 2 ohm na 3 ohm muri series. Resistance yose?

questions.prompt_en: Two resistors 2 ohm and 2 ohm in parallel. Total resistance?
questions.prompt_rw: Resistors 2 ohm na 2 ohm muri parallel. Resistance yose?

questions.prompt_en: If V=6 V and I=2 A, power is:
questions.prompt_rw: Niba V=6 V na I=2 A, power ni:

questions.prompt_en: If I=3 A and R=4 ohm, power is:
questions.prompt_rw: Niba I=3 A na R=4 ohm, power ni:

questions.prompt_en: In a series circuit, current is:
questions.prompt_rw: Muri series circuit, current iba:
questions.explanation_en: Current is the same through all components in series.
questions.explanation_rw: Current iba imwe mu bice byose bya series.

questions.prompt_en: In a parallel circuit, voltage across branches is:
questions.prompt_rw: Muri parallel circuit, voltage ku mashami iba:
questions.explanation_en: Voltage is the same across each branch in parallel.
questions.explanation_rw: Voltage iba imwe ku ishami rya buri parallel.

questions.prompt_en: If V is constant and R doubles, current will:
questions.prompt_rw: Niba V ihoraho kandi R ikikuba kabiri, current iza:
questions.explanation_en: I = V/R, so if R doubles, I halves.
questions.explanation_rw: I = V/R, bityo R ikikuba kabiri, I igabanuka kabiri.

questions.prompt_en: Unit of resistance is:
questions.prompt_rw: Igipimo cya resistance ni:

questions.prompt_en: If V=10 V and I=2 A, resistance is:
questions.prompt_rw: Niba V=10 V na I=2 A, resistance ni:
